title: melicope saint-johnii
intro: Melicope saint-johnii, also known as the Hawaiian mountain garland or Saint John's garland, is a flowering plant species in the family Rutaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine, and it is valued for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to the presence of limonoids and coumarins. The health benefits of Melicope saint-johnii include its ability to alleviate fever, reduce pain and inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. Melicope saint-johnii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
